hotel_description:
Centrally located in Hanoi - mere steps away from vibrant shopping areas, delectable street food stalls, and a quick 3-minute stroll to the trending Train Street, Silk Path Hotel Hanoi, the 4-star accommodations in Hanoi's Old Quarter, offers the discerning visitor a charming and comfortable base from which to explore all the heritage and attractions of the 1,000-year-old capital. Whether you want to experience the hustle and bustle of the myriad Old Quarter streets, the graceful charm of the storied French Quarter or while away the hours watching the world go by with a Vietnamese coffee in hand, you couldn’t start in a better place.

Our 106 rooms offer a premium blend of tasteful and distinguished décor, along with everything you need for a comfortable and restful stay. Explore the culinary offerings at our five unique outlets, where Vietnamese cuisine meets Mediterranean flavors, crafted with locally-sourced ingredients. Start your day with our breakfast buffet, featuring a special Soup of the Day showcasing classic Hanoi noodle dishes like small crab soup, chicken vermicelli, and the worldwide renowned Pho - Vietnamese rice noodles. Whether you want to work up a sweat in the gym, melt into a Jacuzzi or sauna, or get some work done, the hotel has it ready for you.

Silk Path Hotel Hanoi is a 45-minute drive from Noi Bai International Airport. Area attractions within walking distance include Hoan Kiem Lake, Thang Long Water Puppet Theater, St. Joseph Cathedral, Hoa Lo Prison Museum, Temple of Literature, Weekend Night Market, Pedestrian Streets, and so on.
hotel_address: 195-199 Hang Bong Street, Hoan Kiem, Hanoi, Vietnam

hotel_description:
Soaring twenty floors above the city, Pan Pacific Hanoi offers views of the West Lake, Truc Bach Lake and Red River. Just minutes from the city center, guests can visit the vibrant Old Quarter, located just 1.9 mi from the property, or enjoy a stroll by the lake. It features a full spa, indoor heated all-season swimming pool with retractable roof and complimentary WiFi throughout the property.

Pan Pacific Hanoi is 1.7 mi from Thang Long Water Puppet Theater. Attractions less than a 10-minute drive away include the famous Hoan Kiem Lake as well as Ba Dinh Square, Dong Xuan and night markets.

The rooms feature a contemporary style and are decorated with yellow, neutral tones, modern furnishings and Vietnamese designs. They each feature flat-screen LCD TV and fully-stocked mini-bar. Private bathrooms are fitted with a bathtub or shower and provide French bathroom amenities.

Pan Pacific Hanoi offers plenty of food options that include Ming Restaurant that serves authentic dim sum dishes and an array of Chinese delicacies. Pacifica offers a buffet of international cuisines. Guests who wish to simply kick back with a drink can visit the Summit Lounge located on the roof top, which features a panoramic view of the city, or the Song Hong Bar.

Pan Pacific Hanoi can host small or large meetings and events at their state-of-the-art, dedicated business center.

Featuring modern interiors, spacious rooms have private balconies with stunning sea or pool views and outdoor seating. They come with a 46-inch flat-screen cable TV, ample lounge area and yoga mats.

Leisurely afternoons can be spent by the private beachfront or snorkeling in clear waters. Added conveniences include free internet access, a business center and tour desk.

Hearty breakfast buffets and all-day dining are available at Goji Kitchen + Bar while Madame Son Restaurant serves Vietnamese dishes. Light refreshments can be found at Great Room, Writer's Bar and Non Nuoc Bar.

Danang Marriott Resort & Spa is 15 minutes’ drive from Da Nang International Airport. It is 19 mi from the UNESCO Heritage Site of Hoi An.

hotel_description:
Welcome to Phu House Hostel, where four stories of glory await you! As the exclusive hostel flaunting unparalleled architecture on Phu Quoc Island, we offer a stay that's as unique as it is unforgettable.

Conveniently nestled just a 5-minute walk from renowned beach bars like Ocsen Beach Club, Sunset Club, RabbitHole, and more, our hostel serves as the perfect launchpad for your island adventures and nocturnal escapades.

But the excitement doesn't end there! At Phu House Hostel, we pride ourselves on curating the ultimate party experience. Join us for a variety of nightly activities, from heart-pounding rounds of "Beer Pong" to intense "Pool Tournaments," and from exhilarating "Smash Ball" matches to epic "Pub Crawls." Challenge your wits with our brain-teasing "Pub Quiz," groove to the beats at our lively "Pool Parties," and try your luck at "Music Bingo" – the possibilities for fun are endless!

After a day of soaking up the sun and exploring all that Phu Quoc has to offer, retreat to our comfortable accommodations for a well-deserved rest. Then, mingle with fellow travelers in our vibrant common areas, where laughter and camaraderie abound.
Experience the pinnacle of excitement, comfort, and architectural splendor at Phu House Hostel. Book your stay now and prepare for an adventure unlike any other!
hotel_address: 122 Tran Hung Dao Street, Group 7, Duong Dong Town, Phu Quoc Island, Duong To, Phú Quốc, Vietnam
